name: ipsecAssociationDatabaseDeleteAll
title: ipsecAssociationDatabaseDeleteAll
syntax: long ipsecAssociationDatabaseDeleteAll(IP_Endpoint source, IP_Endpoint destination, char[] protocol, char[] mode);
description: With this function it is possible to manually delete all security associations independent of their spi from the security association database of the current network stack.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source endpoint of the security association.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Destination endpoint of the security association.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
